name: task-loop
description: Task-loop setup and preflight support for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Setup and preflight for task-loop in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Use Task Loop to configure the hosted Supabase task board, save local credentials, register a repository, and verify setup. Codex support is rolling out in phases; this slice supports setup and preflight only.
defaultPrompt: Set up task-loop for this repo.
